title: Indulgent Roasted Uruguayan Bread
description: A rich roasted bread dish featuring strong white bread flour and a hint of steam, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220°C (425°F) and place a large roasting pan in the oven to heat up.
Mix the flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
Gradually add the water while mixing the dry ingredients, until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes and place it in a greased bowl, covered with plastic wrap.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
Place the loaf in a greased bowl, covered with plastic wrap.
Let the loaf rise for another 30 minutes, or until it has doubled in size.
Remove the preheated roasting pan from the oven and place the loaf in the pan.
Brush the loaf with egg wash and return it to the oven.
Roast the loaf for 25-30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
Remove the loaf from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Slice the loaf and serve warm.
